center.name: 羅塔島
center.summary: 羅塔島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rota white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is critically endangered and endemic to Rota in the Northern Mariana Islands, where it mainly occurs in mature, wet limestone forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is critically endangered and endemic to Rota in the Northern Mariana Islands, where it mainly occurs in mature, wet limestone forests
